alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (e.g., mycotoxins, metals like arsenic, lead, mercury)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Contaminants and Toxins in Food and Feed (CXS 193-1995). The Codex Alimentarius Commission establishes maximum levels (MLs) for contaminants to be legally permitted in food or feed commodities. These levels are detailed in standards like CXS 193-1995.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Allergen List - Declaration of allergens on labels of prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. Specific requirements for allergen declaration are detailed within the GSO 9:2022 standard.

alerts.title: Modified: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required as per GSO 9:2022. This technical regulation outlines comprehensive labelling requirements for all prepackaged food products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific labelling requirements for prepackaged foodstuffs must be verified by consulting the full GSO 9:2022 standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for genetically modified agricultural products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific general requirements for non-processed genetically modified agricultural products must be verified by consulting the full GSO 2141:2026 standard. This may include labelling requirements for GMOs.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific general requirements for Halal food must be verified by consulting the full GSO 2055-1:2015 standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific mandatory expiration date requirements for food products must be verified by consulting the full GSO 150-1:2013 standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Microbiology Limits - Microbiological criteria
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. Specific microbiological limits for foodstuffs and food ingredients must be verified by consulting the full GSO 1016:2015 standard.

alerts.title: Added: Philippines Labelling Requirement - Source fetch / extraction issue
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Manual review required. Automated extraction failed: {"error":{"code":503,"message":"The service is currently unavailable.","status":"UNAVAILABLE"}}

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Compliance with Regulatory Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply. Applies to all food businesses offering food for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be assessed for safety by SFA. Applies to all food sold in Singapore, including seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Permitted Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Only SFA-assessed additives permitted. Applies to all food products sold in Singapore, including seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Unpermitted Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of an additive.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Compliance with Regulatory Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All food businesses must comply. Applies to all food businesses.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants (Incidental Constituents)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be within SFA’s regulatory limits. Applies to food sold in Singapore, including seasoning and snack products.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants Exceeding Limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Do not import or sell. If laboratory test results indicate contaminants, they must be within specified limits.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Ingredients and Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on food labels. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Peanuts
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sesame seeds
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Soybeans
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite (as residue sulphur dioxide)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10. Mandatory labeling required if residue sulphur dioxide is 10 or more mg/kg. Applies to ingredients or food additives.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Tree nuts
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Mandatory labeling required if present as an ingredient or food additive.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Contaminant Limits - Prohibited foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale exists and must be verified. This may be due to inherent unsafety or specific contaminants.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Delisted color additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Delisted (21 CFR 81.10 and/or 81.30). Substances labeled as 'DELISTED' in the inventory.

alerts.title: Added: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from use in food (21 CFR Part 189). Substances listed as 'PROHIBITED' or 'PROHIBITED WITH EXCEPTIONS' in the inventory.

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. Sesame was added effective January 1, 2023, by the FASTER Act.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Contaminant Limits - 3-Monochloropropane-1,2-Diol (3-MCPD)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: 1. New: 1. This is a Guidance Level.

alerts.title: Added: United States Contaminant Limits - Aflatoxins, total
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 20. This is an Action Level. Specific limits for Brazil nuts, peanuts, and pistachio nuts are also 20 ppb.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Establishments must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate allergen labeling, as per 21 CFR part 117 (CGMP & PC rule).. Part of the 'Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food' rule.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared on the label. Identified as allergenic substances derived from insects.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Declaration of Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared in one of two ways: in parentheses after the ingredient name, OR in a 'contains' statement immediately after or next to the ingredient list.. The type of tree nut (e.g., almonds), species of fish (e.g., bass), and species of Crustacean shellfish (e.g., crab) must also be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be identified on labels. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Gluten-free claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must meet a defined standard for gluten content. The FDA issued a final rule defining 'gluten-free' for food labeling on August 2, 2013, and established compliance requirements for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the 'gluten-free' claim on August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present in food at or above the specified concentration, due to adverse reactions in sensitive individuals.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required via Codex General Standard for Food Additives (GSFA) Online Database. The GSFA (Codex STAN 192-1995) sets forth the conditions under which permitted food additives may be used in all foods. Users are encouraged to consult the database and its Preamble for specific provisions.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Additive Limits - Permitted Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: Codex Contaminant Limits - Mycotoxins in Spices
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Prevention and reduction required. A Code of Practice (CXC 78-2017) exists for the prevention and reduction of mycotoxins in spices.

alerts.title: Removed: Codex Contaminant Limits - Maximum Levels for Contaminants
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Modified: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. New: Verification required against Union list of food additives. The database provides information on approved food additives and their conditions of use, based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Verification required against food safety criteria and process hygiene criteria. Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005 lays down food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins and metabolites in specific foods, and process hygiene criteria.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Compliance with food safety criteria in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005, verified through shelf-life studies (durability studies and challenge tests). Technical guidance documents provide information on how to conduct shelf-life studies for Listeria monocytogenes in RTE foods to comply with food safety criteria.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes (on surfaces)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: New: Sampling procedures required on food processing areas and equipment surfaces. Guidelines describe sampling procedures for food business operators manufacturing RTE food to detect L. monocytogenes on processing surfaces.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii), their toxins and metabolites (e.g., staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
alerts.actionRequired: Regulatory/QA review recommended.
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: New: Verification required as per GSO 2055-1:2015. This technical regulation outlines the general requirements for food to be considered Halal, which impacts the selection of ingredients and additives.

alerts.details: Old: Meat, milk, organs of livestock, and meat, organs of poultry, and specified products thereof must not be imported for sale without certificates from the exporting country's governmental organization, certifying they are free from specified diseases or abnormalities.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.details: Old: Food and additives specified by MHLW as requiring special process control measures must not be imported for sale unless produced or processed in MHLW-specified countries, regions, or facilities that actually take those measures. Verification of MHLW specifications is required.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

Verification of MHLW specifications is required.. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.
